title: 虹色のハーデンベルギア

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, on that day, she shined brighter—and more
brilliantly—than anyone else. That was the first time we ever met.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I met her at a scrimmage. During the final stretch—out of
nowhere—she overtook one, then another, and yet another...

text_block_list.name: Racers
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?!
Huh?!
No way she's that fast!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She swept aside the competition and flew into first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That explosive, overwhelming power. That brilliant, yet beautiful
running. It was just like...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew! Hehe, that felt pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! Come over here! It's time to review and reflect on the
race you ran just now.

text_block_list.name: Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
Your victory is commendable, but be careful not to rely on a
last-minute burst of speed. If you can clean up your running during
the rest of the race—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Shuuut up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Shaddup, shaddup, shaddup! Don't tell me what to do! 'Cause I'm not
gonna listen to a siiingle word you say!

text_block_list.name: Instructor A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Sw-Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nope, nuh-uh, nada—I'm not listeniiing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, what's her deal?! This sucks! It's all so boring—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, you! What're you looking at?!
choice_data_list: Um... it was, uh, like magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so lost in thought about her running that I end up saying the first
thing that comes to mind. She's probably weirded out by what I just—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Did you just say magic?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You said it, didn't you?! M-a-g-i-c! Just now! Explain yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ So sweet! ♪ Deeelish! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An hour—and one chocolate parfait with extra whipped cream—later,
Sweep Tosho smiles with a look of satisfaction on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for how this happened, well...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if we're gonna talk, let's talk over sweets! Lemme eat something.
Your treat, of course!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Can't you see how tired I am from all that running?! Some pudding, a
parfait, or even a cake—just gimme some sweets, nooow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Just so you know, I won't settle for anything average! It's gotta be sweet, yummy, AND cute! ♪ So, lead the way! C'mooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, after a bit of coercion, I find myself here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, about what we were talking about earlier. You said my running
was like magic, didn't you? What'd you mean by that?
choice_data_list:
Uhhh, it just kinda popped into my head,
honest—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's it?! What the heck, I don't get you at all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hah... whatever. And here I was, thinking I'd finally found a lead on
racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yup... Grandma taught it to me. She told me racing magic was the
best.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you don't know, so I'll fill you in. You're in the presence
of the genius Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Someday, I'll become a great witch like Grandma. That's why I need
to hurry up and learn racing magic.
choice_data_list: ...So you want to learn how to use magic?
...So you want to learn how to use magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Who wouldn't?! Listen up, okay? Magic is...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna! No, no, no! Nooooo waaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Father
text_block_list.text:
Sw-Sweepy! There's nothing to be scared of, okay? You're great at
English! Your teacher even told me you got a perfect score on your
last t—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna! If I don't wanna, I don't wanna! I'm not going!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Father
text_block_list.text:
Um, how about singing then? We can go to singing lessons instead!
You won an award for that too! I'm sure this is the st—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooo meanssss nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(No, no, no! I mean, it's all so boring! Do this, do that—everyone's
always trying to tell me what to do!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Getting praised for doing well doesn't make it fun! So I'm done!
Never again! No, no, no!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahaha! My child, you're too young to be bored by the world
already. Let's see here...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Carpe diem!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Now, isn't that a nice fragrance? Take a deep breath and take it all
in, my little Sweepy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
These flowers are so pretty... But how?! You didn't have these a
second ago! How... C'mon, c'mon, c'mon—how'd you do it?! Tell me
already, Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
You want to know? Sweepy, this here, is magic. I'm a great witch, so I
can use every kind of magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Magic?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Magic, huh? Tell me more, tell me more! It sounds really fun!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I wanna try too! I wanna try using magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I can see that. Then come with me. I've got the perfect hat for
you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
My little Sweepy. Listen well, because Grandma is about to teach you
just how fun and exciting magic can be!
